summary: Frontend-only verification of Client360View (/client-360) after swapping Simple* embeds to FULL unified pages (HouseholdBudget, UnifiedInvestments, UnifiedTaxCentre). All 3 swapped tabs render the full standalone interfaces identical to their route counterparts. Retirement (RetirementWorkshop) and Goals (SimpleGoals) regression still intact. Standalone routes /budget, /investments, /tax-analysis-sync still render with Layout wrapper.

issues: Recharts console warnings 'width(-1) height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' (repeated ~12x). Non-blocking pre-existing issue carried over from iteration 170 — charts still render after initial resize. Consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer in affected components (HouseholdBudget expense donut & cashflow bar chart, UnifiedInvestments asset allocation pie & holdings-by-entity bar chart).

design_issues.screen: Client360View header vs embedded content data mismatch
issues: Header still shows Total Wealth $1.61M (DEMO_CLIENT_DATA.client_1 in Client360View.jsx) while the embedded HouseholdBudget/UnifiedInvestments show Thompson HNW-level figures ($11.67M portfolio, $26,437 monthly income, $185,000 family income) sourced from CLIENT_DATA.thompson_family. Two parallel mock data sources for same client produce inconsistent numbers — already flagged in iteration 170, still unresolved.

action_items: (Optional) Unify DEMO_CLIENT_DATA (Client360View.jsx) with CLIENT_DATA (data/clientData.js) to eliminate $1.61M vs $11.67M discrepancy between header and embedded full pages.

(Optional) Fix Recharts ResponsiveContainer width/height warnings by adding minWidth/minHeight fallback — affects HouseholdBudget donut/line charts, UnifiedInvestments pie/bar charts when first rendered inside hidden Radix TabsContent.
critical_code_review_comments: Client360View.jsx remains >1200 lines — tab contents should be extracted into separate components per tab for maintainability.
Duplicate mock datasets (DEMO_CLIENT_DATA vs CLIENT_DATA) continue to diverge across features — source-of-truth risk growing as more full pages are embedded.
TabsList with 14 tabs + overflow-x-auto works but is a UX smell on mid-width screens; consider grouping or a secondary nav.
seed_data_creation: localStorage bypass only: wealth_command_compliance_v5='permanent', app_mode='adviser', selected_client={id:'client_1',name:'David & Sarah Thompson'}
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client360View embeds verified after Simple->Full swap: Budget tab (tab-content-budget) renders full HouseholdBudget with Monthly Income $26,437, Monthly Expenses $8,726, Annual One-offs $8,400, Monthly Surplus $17,011, Overview/Income/Expenses/One-Offs sub-tabs, expense breakdown (Mortgage/Utilities/Groceries/Transport/Phone/Insurance/Education/Entertainment/Savings), 12-Month Cashflow Projection. Investments tab (tab-content-investments-view) renders full UnifiedInvestments with all 9 sub-tabs (Overview/Bonds/Cash & TDs/Crypto/Managed Funds/Property/Shares & ETFs/SMSF/Super & Pension/Unlisted), Total Assets $11.67M, Liabilities $2.06M, Net Worth $9.61M, Weighted Return +5.9%, 15 Holdings, Asset Allocation pie & Holdings by Entity bar charts, Portfolio Rebalancing. Tax tab (tab-content-tax) renders full UnifiedTaxCentre with all 8 sub-nav items (Tax Analysis/BAS Calculator/Capital Gains/Division 7A/Tax Loss Harvesting/Income Splitting/Tax Calendar/Trust Distributions), Total Family Income $185K, Total Tax Payable $40,776, Net Income $144,224, Family/Company/Comparison tabs, David Thompson member card with Income Tax $26,788, Medicare $2,400. Retirement tab retains retirement-workshop-page testid. Goals tab retains simple-goals testid. Overview tab works. Standalone routes /budget, /investments, /tax-analysis-sync all load with Layout (sidebar + top 'Viewing: David & Sarah Thompson AUM: $11.7M' strip visible). No console errors; only non-blocking Recharts width/height warnings.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues requiring RCA. All requested features working as intended.
